openingPrompts.text: I help at my family's shop
I drive people or deliver things
I fix or build things with my hands
I work on a farm or with animals

transcript: I help at my family's shop — serving customers, managing the stock, and sometimes delivering orders on my motorbike.

skills.name: Customer Service
skills.translation: Greeting, helping & resolving issues for customers
skills.confidenceReason: You clearly described serving customers — no follow-up needed.
skills.evidencePrompt: A photo of your shop or workspace

skills.name: Inventory & Stock
skills.translation: Tracking what comes in and what goes out
skills.confidenceReason: You mentioned managing stock — we want to understand how, to place this skill correctly.

followUps.q: How do you keep track of stock?
Do you decide what to reorder?

skills.evidencePrompt: A photo of a stock list or shelf

skills.name: Driving & Delivery
skills.confidenceReason: You drive sometimes — a few details (vehicle, license) help us verify.

followUps.q: Do you have a driver's license?

skills.evidencePrompt: A photo of your license or vehicle
